basic_details.organization_name: Regional Science Centre, Bhubaneswar (Under National Council of Science Museums - NCSM)
basic_details.short_information: RSC Bhubaneswar Trainee Craft Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in Interview for 04 Trainee Posts on 02 June 2026 at Bhubaneswar. Check vacancy details, eligibility criteria, salary, selection process and interview venue information here.

qualification.education_qualification: SSC / Matriculation with ITI Certificate in relevant trade from a Government recognized institution. Candidates who passed ITI on or after 2023 are eligible.

how_to_apply: This is a Walk-in recruitment. No online application is required.
seo_tags: RSC Bhubaneswar Trainee Craft Recruitment 2026 – Walk in
